svg.title: Falcon MDP pricing AWS architecture
svg.desc: Alert events on Amazon MSK flow to the Normalization ECS service which either routes directly to the Research Agent for PREV DAY CLOSE or enqueues alerts in SQS FIFO when the feed is pending. MDP ready events on MSK trigger the Feed Handler ECS which calls MDP, populates DynamoDB, and drains the SQS queue. The Research Agent on ECS and Bedrock reads from DynamoDB and uses Neptune for SOP.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do EPW and DAS alerts arrive on this MSK topic?')
sendPrompt('What does the Normalization service decide and how?')
sendPrompt('How is the SQS FIFO queue keyed and how long do messages wait?')
sendPrompt('What is the DynamoDB single-table key design for all data types?')
sendPrompt('What does the MDP ready event payload contain?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the Feed Handler drain process step by step')
sendPrompt('What does the MDP price API return and how is it called?')
sendPrompt('What does the Research Agent receive and what tools does it have?')
sendPrompt('How does Neptune serve the research SOP?')
